MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-10-2019 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CARLOS MAGANA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. JEAN GARASCIA, COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER, WITH OATH ON FILE, PRESENT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SRB)
